title: APNS-201 Dorm Cum Dumpster College Girl, Nana Maeno
description: An abandoned warehouse on the outskirts of Kanagawa. There, men with multiple debtors gathered from anti-social organizations were forced to work on industrial waste disposal. They have reached the limit because they are both physically and physically scraped by strong labor. One day, it was Nana, a part-time delivery worker, who came to distribute the lunch box once a week. The women drought, and as soon as they saw Nana, they laid it down. Since then, Nana can be used as a sexual treatment tool every day and night. And a yakuza man who divides the warehouse also appears ... [* The image and sound may be distorted, but please note that this is not a defect of the product itself.]
maker: オーロラプロジェクト・アネックス
